entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

Task 2 Completed.

Screenshot:

1)   Data Preview of the CDS View Entity which contains,

    a)   1 new field with concatenated value of Total_Price and Currency_Code and new field with Overall Status Text.

 

    b)   CDS View Entity.

entry.title: Re: product master categorization - Classification
entry.content: Object dependencies are not restricted to class type 300. They work as well for batch classification i.e. class types 022 and 023.

entry.title: SAP Integrated Financial Planning export job overwrite between two model
entry.content: We are using IFP from content and created export job on Profitability and OPEX model. Data sit in ACDOCP table in S/4 but even though we put a filter on FPA1 for their respective node ( 17 for Profitability and 18 for OPEX) data overwrite each other. Please help us in resolving this issue.

entry.title: Re: TM link between /scmtms/d_torrot and /scmtms/d_trqstg
entry.content:
Hi William,

/SCMTMS/TOR and /SCMTMS/TRQ are different Business objects.
Freight Units are stored in /SCMTMS/TOR BO. Right DB Table for Freight Unit Roots is /SCMTMS/D_TORROT, for Stops - /SCMTMS/D_TORSTP, Stages (STOP_SUCCESSOR Node) - /SCMTMS/D_TORSTS.

/SCMTMS/TRQ stores Transportation Requests. One of use-cases is storing OTRs (Order-based Transportation Requirement) and DTRs (Delivery-based Transportation Requirement) in standalone TM setup.

Best regards,
Uladzimir.

entry.title: Re: Adding Structure in EMIGALL
entry.content:
Hi Sachin,

Could you please provide a solution here?

Thanks

entry.title: Merge PDF of type TLINE
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have one requirement in which I have to merge multiple PDF's. The problem is that I am getting these PDF from spool. I have used the FM "CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF " to get the spool request in a table with type TLINE. Now again I want to fetch another spool request and merge both the files in one PDF file.

I am unable to merge these files.

Even if I concatenate all it_pdf in byte mode. I am getting the last PDF only but not the whole or complete merged PDF.

Please help me with it.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Bom dia Luize, td bem? 

Nós aqui implementamos todas as notas mencionadas acima e somente agora é que o governo irá cobrar esta informação.  

Estou com duas dúvidas que gostria de saber se vc pode me ajudar:

1) Estamos migrando para o DRC e não vejo esta tabela associada ao novo programa de envio de documentos NFE_SEND_DOCUMENT_TO_CLOUD, somente o antigo J_BNFECALLRFC.  Tem alguma nota que precise ser aplicada para ajustar isto?

2) outro ponto é que já temos todos os campos disponíveis e mesmo após a aplicação de todas as notas, não estou encontrando de onde virá a informação pra popular todos estes campos do crédito presumido e do RBC.

Alguém poderia me ajudar com isso?

obrigada

Lúcia

entry.title: Re: Incoming EHF invoices
entry.content:
Hello @Camis99,

I did not understood it entirely but I do get the pieces of it. You want to have an integration in place where in complete information of the invoice is moved to SAP system.

I think of two things here, from process and practice perspective. If invoice is PO driven then it should be posted with reference to that so that line items are taken accordingly and no manual work, so GR process and invoice auto-scheduling needs to be aligned, if possible. Make use of the relevant APIs available in SAP Hub for that. If attachment is also there looks for attachment service which SAP provides (if that is applicable to your case).

Rest if my understanding is wrong kindly explain your process in detail for better interpretation. 

Thanks and Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: How can I activate sample management in the cloud?
entry.content: Hi Nina, thanks for your question. As personally discussed, this is possible at the moment: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d1e58be39d884a0dbf75a7526a9acbf4/f2bbb1b40cb243f1aec78b1a04bd0bd5.html?q=Prüfpunkt&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: How can I activate sample management in the cloud?

entry.title: Re: SAP fiori embedded plus standalone FES
entry.content:
Another FES will not solve the security fears that you mentioned. 

Do you already have public access to the system via a browser and your concern is the mobile devices? Even if you create an app for the mobile devices, nothing will stop the user to start a browser and access the system...

One option is to create a external server (like a portal) and use it as endpoint for Soap/REST calls from the mobile APP and create a tunnel between this new server and the WD. This way, you will only accept calls from one particular IP address (the PORTAL server).

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Basic Properties - Additional fields?
entry.content:
No to the Basic Properties category, no. But as Shane says, you can add your own category (which will appear at the bottom of the property sheet) - and those properties can be used in documents, filters, placeholders, etc. 

All you really need is a Classes property in your Adaptable Resources that defines these. It is all covered in SEN300 (which is why it is usually left to the Implementation Consultant) but like Shane notes, you need a Learning Hub subscription to get to that. But if you DM me I'll get you details on the basics.

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW Project Responsible Person name on SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

please try the following CDS Views:

I_EnterpriseProject

I_EnterpriseProjectTeamMember (Join condition: ProjectUUID)

I_EnterpriseProjectRole (Join condition: ProjectUUID)

You can get the business partner data from I_WorkforcePerson (join with BusinessPartnerUUID).

You can filter for the ProjectRoleName to get only 'Project Managers'.

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi!, here is the data preview ss.
Thanks for for the Task 2.
Best regards

entry.title: Re: Can see only a Learner view and not the admin view as...
entry.content: Either someone removed your access, or (more likely) you are now logging in as a different user - either now via SSO vs. local user, or (if this is happening for everyone), Access Admin changed the format of the UUID being passe from the IAS/IDP and now SAP Enable Now thinks you are a new user (e.g., they used to pass john.doe@company.com and now they pass JDOE) - You can check this by searching the Users list and see if you now have multiple IDs.

entry.title: Re: RE-FX - Contract Valuation - RECECN - Upload Mass
entry.content: Hi Achyuth, thanks you. I found the structure relation E1BP_RE_TERM_CE_DAT and E1BP_RE_TERM_CECOND_DAT.

entry.title: Re: FAGLCORC
entry.content: Dear Sir and Madam, we still have SAP ECC (no S4HANA). I have a question regarding TCODE FAGLCORC. Is it still in use? Recently we fought out, the TCODE FAGLCORC is not visible in SAP ECC menue. Any idea? many thanks. Ayleen

entry.title: Re: Merge PDF of type TLINE
entry.content: You're plain wrong in thinking that 2 PDF can be merged by just concatenating their bytes. You need special code to merge 2 PDF files; there's one class to do that, which you can find by searching the forum. Another solution is to merge the two ABAP List spool files into one ABAP List spool file before calling CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF once.

entry.title: Re: Report to get list of De-activated users in SAP
entry.content:
Hi , 

we can use table - usr02 to get the user list which are deactivated by using user lock flag (UFLAG) 

Please find the below relavant status for user lock.

select * from usr02 into table @DATA(lt_users) where uflag <> '0'.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Unable to run Cloud Connector on M2 or Intel processors - sapcc-2.17.1-macosx version
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am running a Mac on M2 and other one on Intel processor.

Installed sapcc-2.17.1-macosx-x64 for Intel / and sapcc-2.17.1-macosx-aarch64  version for M2.

Installed jdk 17 and also tried with jdk 21, I even tried the SAPMachine version as well.

All instances I get the below error:

"Detected mismatch between jdk binaries for arm64 and scc binaries for directory)

Stopping the process. Ensure to use the corresponding binaries either for x86_64 or for arm64

Set env variable NO_CHECK=1 to overcome this check"

I have tried the previous versions of cloud connector on Intel Mac earlier and connected with WEBIDE / and BAS and have no issues earlier. 

Any ideas how I could overcome this? 

I have also checked this blog as well . 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-install-sap-cloud-connector-on-a-mac-m2-processor/qaq-p/13697727#:~:text=Navigate%20to%20the%20%5BSAP%20Development,this%20version%20to%20your%20computer.&text=Save%20the%20changes%20to%20ensure%20the%20script%20uses%20the%20correct%20Java%20environment.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Mapping - Concat repeating elements
entry.content:
I'm afraid I don't have the patience to construct XSDs to build a graphical mapping example, but here is an XSLT that will accomplish the job, and it takes much less time to get to the finish line.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
    <xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"/>
    <xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/>
    <xsl:template match="SomeNode2">
        <xsl:copy>
          <ConcatNode><xsl:apply-templates select="textContent"/></ConcatNode>          
        </xsl:copy>
    </xsl:template>

    <xsl:template match="textContent">
      <xsl:choose>
        <xsl:when test="position() != last()">
          <xsl:value-of select="concat(., ', ')"/>
        </xsl:when>
        <xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="."/></xsl:otherwise>
      </xsl:choose>
    </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Su...
entry.content:
Dear Elena,

the tricky thing is if you want to have a combined threshold for the number of active vehicles and number of active drivers.
For example, if active drivers = 14 and active vehicles is 10 and you want to do the pricing based on the total quantity of 24 units:
fixed price 50€ for the first 19 units + 5 * 5€ resulting in 75€.
In Subscription Billing, there is currently no means do to such cross-charge aggregation. And given the other rating strategies like same or different prices for these combinations, I think you would indeed require for each scenario a distinct metric = rate element.

Drivers units priced independently from vehicles - then you can use the setup you've chosen.
Drivers priced together with the vehicles - then you probably need another rate element which represents the metric "drivers + vehicles). 

After reading your last reply, I also think that rate subelements could be a good approach for your scenario. Just keep in mind, that each combination of rate element and rate subelement is resulting in separat charges in the bill. And that the rating and pricing for each usage record will be done separately. 

Best, Carsten

entry.title: Re: Merge PDF of type TLINE
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi you beat me to it... I contemplated but couldn't bring myself to type that out.

entry.title: Re: Product aggregation on Billing document for customer...
entry.content:
Hello,
"Aggregations in pricing" won't help here. This feature is focusing on aggregating multiple sub-periods within one billing cycle for the price.

To achieve this kind of aggregation within Subscription Billing you would need to maintain all devices within one subscription. There you assign multiple "Technical Resources" to each rate element.
However, by doing so you are loosing the option to pause & resume individual devices.

If you want to keep your modelling there might be the option to do the aggregation during transfer of billing data to S4H Sales Billing. This would require a custom iFlow where multiple bill charges are combined.

You could also look for options within S4H Sales Billing to combine multiple billing requests. Not sure what is possible there.

Best regards
Ralf

entry.title: Re: Budget Control at Purchase Requisition (PR) Level in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear @SebastianDoll ,

Thank you for your prompt and detailed response. I attempted to access the first link provided, but it seems to be broken, as I received a 'Page Not Found' error. Could you please provide an updated link?

Regards,
Vignesh Avasarala

@vsvaradha

entry.title: Re: Local Currency and Customer currency Conversion
entry.content:
Hi Prabhat,

I understand you would like to print the values in local and document currency. To achieve this you might need to adjust your form template - the values are already part of the global form data provider: Go into the app Output Management Form Template and have a look at the data source of your billing form. If you use Data Source FDP_V3_BD_STANDARD_GLO_GEN_SRV you will find the INR values you are looking for in the local currency fields <ConditionAmountLocCurr>, <ConditionBaseValueLocCurr> etc. 

To check the XML for a specific billing form, go to the all "Change billing document" and put the string #&&Download_form_data_xml&&# into your Print Queue field - then press Display Document. This will open the XML and show you all fields of your data source with the respective values. 

Best regards

Anja

entry.title: Re: How to delete a version in FIN-CS
entry.content:
Hello,

If i understand correctly, you would like to delete created version SSCUI 101012 Define Versions. It is not supported to delete created entries in various SSCUIs. Please see link for more details:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/deletion-of-custom-configurations-customer-adaptation-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13598337

Check the Accelerator - Configuration Activity.xlsm (SAP Customer) which is available in the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition (3 system landscape) 

Column Q is provides filter and lists configurations which support custom entry deletion. 

You can modify the custom entry or re-name to 'Do not use'.

Regards,

Yanica

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0...
entry.content: Agreed - we've done that but since they were not able to replicate the issue, they didn't provide any substantive support. Was hoping someone out there has run into this before. We will continue to provide examples to SAP in hopes that they can find a resolution.

entry.title: Re: Unauthorised error while connecting to Built Process...
entry.content: Could this error be due to an incorrect API endpoint being used? In the documentation, the API endpoint includes a "/public" segment: https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/public/workflow/rest (see https://api.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/overview > Configuration Details).

entry.title: Get Started with SAP BTP Document Management Service (video)
entry.content:
Many of you may have been introduced to the SAP BTP Document Management Service in using SAP Build process Automation, which has some integrations with DMS so your process can allow users to upload documents and you can add those documents to approval forms.

DMS also provides other capabilities, such as versioning, search, and access control, and can be used as a content server from the SAP S/4HANA attachment service. @AlexDong has written a wonderful blog collecting a lot of the information about DMS, especially from an SAP S/4HANA perspective.

To help, especially for newbies who've seen DMS from SAP Build perspective, I have created a TechByte video to show what DMS is, the different parts of DMS, how to install the Integration (API) Option, and how to make API calls to work with repos and documents.

In future videos, we'll look at the application option for doing the same thing but with a GUI, how to access documents on mobile, and finally how to work with DMS in SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Apps.

it helped to setup logic , there is very less content on BRF+ real time business requirements and issues. In NAST output which we used to easily setup logic for that we are struggling to set in BRF+ , Thanks for sharing TABLE for BRF+ "APOC_D_OR_ITEM"

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
Thanks for the suggestion @SivaRamaKrishnaP . But these are SAP delivered ovp pages, we don't have access to the manifest.json to enable authorizations for cards.

Are you suggesting we create a custom version of the SAP's ovp page with all the cards? Or is there another way to override the original app's manifest.json in the adaptation project?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to create a custom mapping IFlow?
entry.content:
You can either use a local Message Mapping (easiest) or reference an existing Message Mapping (separate artifact, useful for re-use purposes).

To use a local Message Mapping, just use the 'create' button to create a local mapping file, and upload your in/output edmx/specification documents:

To reference an existing mapping file, this has be created first outside of your iflow.

See documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/message-mapping

entry.title: 🟠 wdi5 - lost in documentation
entry.content:
Even though wdi5’s documentation and repo is full of content, examples and recipes, it’s easy to get lost in taking it all in. That’s why we want to highlight a couple of not so obvious options to test UI5 apps with wdi5, hands-on:
- handle UI5 long polling of endpoints ("waitAsync is already running")
- BTP IAS authentication
- ominous "interaction: root" selector property
- screenshots and browser resolution in headless/CI mode

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Activating SAP Actual Costing After implementing Material Ledger in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Thank you for the detailed blog. We have a situation where CCS is activated by client, and they do not have any production scenario. They are into trading business. In your blog, can you please add details about accounting entries which gets posted on month end and period start? This will help to understand the end-to-end process in detail.

entry.title: NEW Substance Volume Tracking - S/4HANA for Product compliance
entry.content:
Hello all, hoping anyone can help.

First of all this relates to the NEW S/4HANA Product Compliance module, and NOT the "classic" Product safety / EHSM applications. 

I have gone through all of the material of S/4HANA Product compliance material (2022 on SAP learning hub, "product compliance in a nutshell" on OpenSAP, and 2023 on help.sap.com) so I have a fairly good idea of the core concept and the main goals (side note - if anyone wants to get in touch with me with anything Product compliance s/4 related, send me a message :)). 

I am exploring the substance volume tracking solution area and I have a few questions that hopefully the SAP experts can answer. 

- Can anyone confirm if the ability to perform checks in the value chain is available for SVT on 2023? I can see that for Product marketability, dangerous goods, and SDS, there are check/block features available, however for SVT I cannot find anything in relation to this. So far, it only looks like we can just view the thresholds via the "monitor substance volumes" app. But is there anyway to actually block transactions if, say, the volume goes above the threshold?

- I fully understand that to get the most out of the module, we should use Product Marketability before SVT or SDS management. But can anyone confirm that functionally, we can use substance volume tracking separately without using product marketability? Current thinking is if it possible to deploy the Product Marketability processes at a later time, and deploy SVT (and SDS) functionality first. It looks like this is possible to me technically (i.e. setup a compliance requirement that is SVT relevant).

- There seems to be only a limited number of compliance requirements available that are SVT relevant. I am just curious to know why is that? In my simple mind, I would have expected for all "substance list check" compliance requirements to be SVT relevant as well? I guess for now, we can take the existing "best practice" requirements, and create a new version from that. 

shamelessly tagging: @christoph_bergemann @Michael_Schalk 🙂

Many thanks in advance

Shashi

entry.title: Re: Balance Sheet/Income Statement Custom S4HC ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I checked the In-App-Extensibility options for this app and the app 'Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional'.

Unfortunately it's not possible to use the CDS Views C_FINSTMNTCOMPARISON or I_FinancialStatementCube for a Custom Analytical Query:

'Query cannot be created from the source query C_FINSTMNTCOMPARISON'.

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: Re: Create JOB /SCWM/CHM_LOG
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a case to SAP Global and they solved the problem. They shared a note regarding this issue. If anyone encounters the same problem, they can refer to note 3497905 - Auto Correction for Check Monitor WO.

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content:
I see your signature in the email that notification of the new positing but I don't see it here in the Community itself. It should appear on all your posts, not just new ones.  Perhaps you should report this to community@sap.com - I'm not sure what's happening there.  

I do see signatures from other people in this thread, but maybe they have changed some settings on who's allow to display signatures?

entry.title: Re: ERROR CSapEditorCtrl::GetObject: Object 33 does not exist in GUI 8.00
entry.content:
We are using SAP GUI 8.00 PL7.

After experiencing this issue in transaction SMARTFORMS we ran the report RSCPSETEDITOR to check whether MS Word is used as editor.

The checkbox for "Smart Forms" was empty. After checking it the issue was resolved.

Check oss note 2267927 - it's still valid for SAP GUI 8.00.

entry.title: Re: Backup Status of Public Edition ERP
entry.content: Hi @Yvonnewang  ,thank you for your question! It appears that there has been no further feedback from you on this topic. We therefore assume that the question could already be clarified. If your question is still valid, please send us your reply.

entry.title: 9H Paymnet budget and 9I Commi budget Mismatch
entry.content:
We are facing the weird view in fund management after S4 HANA Migration. Our 9H payment budget consumed more than commitment budget 9I . When we checked the report and table, we find below 4 document which is triggered 9H budget only. All 4 document is 2024 year. Please find the attachment for details. 

9H (12,138,544.29) - 9I (9,906,602.82)  = Varieance 

Regards

Sarvottam Tomar

entry.title: When I used to Upload the Crystal report in SAP business One via Report and Layout Import Wizard,
entry.content: When I upload Crystal Reports to SAP Business One via the Report and Layout Import Wizard, it takes a considerable amount of time. Is there an alternative method for uploading Crystal Reports in SAP Business One that is faster?

entry.title: ABAP Debugger: organize the screen
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've a question concerning the ABAP Debugger and how to organize the screen: when I go in debug, the proposed screen is like this:

left side, the source code is shown

right side, I've two panels, on the top one there is the 'ABAP and Screen Stack', on the bottom panel the 'Variables' list

 

now, I would like to have the top right panel simply removed, having only the variables one;

 

Do you have any idea how the settings shall be set to obtain this?

 

Thanks and bye,

Jepy F

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
Hopefully you are all having a great day! 

Calling all community members now that you are registered, to discuss "how do you prepare?" Attending virtual events can be tricky with hectic work schedules and so many commitments! It is so easy to get sidetracked and somehow not achieve 😅on what you set forth! I'm calling on a handful of SAP Champions and SAP Mentors to share how they will prepare!

How do you prepare for a virtual interactive session? How do you prepare you in advance to ensure your questions get answered? 

@agalal1, @BaerbelWinkler, @TammyPowlas , @boobboo, @Bernard, @Daniel, 

@DiegoDora, architectSAP; @Karen 😎😁🖥@LeonardoAraujo @johna69 , @Ruthvik_Chowdary , @KunalBansal 💽🖱@david_ruizb 

Prepare, prepare, prepare!! Calling all community members, champions and mentors -- share your tips?? Tag a community friend too!

entry.title: Preassignment of tax categories in customer output tax is not working in migration cockpit
entry.content:
When a customer BP is created and extended to a sales org, output tax table entries are added automatically. Once the tax categories are determined automatically, user has to just enter value for tax classification. 

While extending a customer through migration cockpit, this functionality is not working. 

How can user update this without having to manually add each tax category as there will be thousands of entries with bulk uploads?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Preassignment of tax categories in customer output ta...
entry.content:
The automatic derivation of Output tax only works via transaction BP. (Maybe also Fiori and MDG).

In migrate your data and API (technically the same) it is required to provide KNVI data explicitly. The reason is: Only the keys are determined automatically, not the values (typically 0 for not tax-relevant and 1 for tax-relevant, but it varies). But the values might be set to mandatory and then not filled, so throw an error. Even when not mandatory: the empty lines have no meaning, so there is no point of adding them automatically - except in transaction BP (or other UIs) where it enables the user to enter the values for the relevant keys. 

In conclusion, only BP will works. API or migrate your data tool will not automatically extend the output tax.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

Let's go!!

Here is the data preview with new fields:

Thanks & regards,

Pankaj Gupta

entry.title: SAP Result Analysis data migration from Legacy (Non SAP system) to SAP ECC system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently using SAP ECC system. We are doing a rollout of a company which has a go live date of 1st August 2024 (Transfer Date is not the 1st date of the Fiscal Year) The current legacy system is a non SAP system. 

With ECC, the the revenue based result analysis will be used to determine work in progress and Reserves for Unrealized costs. 

On the go live date, the expectations is that open WBS elements will also be transferred in ECC system. 

I have the below situation:

Planning details are as below:

The planning margin is 40%

on the last day in Legacy system, there is only cost booked against the WBS

The cost is settled in the legacy system by capitalizing the cost as Work in progress. 

on the go live date 1st August'2024, we have actual costs and actual revenues

 

Note: The cost of legacy period (1500) has been posted in the ECC system and is displayed in actual values in the WBS report. 

When the KKA2 is run, the, to date actual cost, are coming as 2500 (1500 +1000) and actual revenue is coming as 3000. As the Revenue based model is selected for result analysis, the system calculates correctly the cost of sales and calculated profit based on planned revenue margin of 40%

System also calculates the WIP amount correctly as 700 for till date. 

The issue is that I am expecting that system posts an entry of 800 (1500-800=700) to reduce the WIP to bring the WIP to 700. But when the settlement is run, the system is posting additional 700 in WIP. 

Due to this the balance in WIP is becoming 2200 (1500 + 700 = 2200)

How do I get the system to get the WIP reversed by 800?

Do let me know if additional information is required from my end. 

 

Regards,

Jared Antao

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Istanbul - 2024
entry.content:
I'm excited to announce that the next SAP Inside Track event in Istanbul will take place on September, 28th!

SAP Inside Track is a community-driven event, open and free for everyone whether you are a customer, partner, freelancer or student. This full-day event will be packed with sessions on SAP technologies, offering a great opportunity to connect with fellow community members during the day. 

Thanks to NTT Data Business Solutions Türkiye for hosting the event and @Hilal_Kurt for organizing the venue and helping with all the other details. 

If you are interested in presenting, please submit your session proposals by the end of August 21th.

Please fill the form Call for Speakers until the end of the August 21th. 

Stay tuned!, next week we'll be sharing the agenda and other details.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Product Allocation Process
entry.content: @Ruthvik_Chowdary  - Request for any update on the above requirement

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Financial Planning export job overwrit...
entry.content:
Dear @madhavvikranth_p,

it's important to understand the plan data scope when exporting data from SAC to S/4.
If the data export from one model is overwriting the data exported from the other model, then this is related to a plan data scope overlap.

Please have a look at our documentation Examples: Financial Data Import, Example 2. It explains how the plan data scope is working. Please ensure that the filter settings of both export jobs are disjoint.

This should solve your issue.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Product aggregation on Billing document for customer...

entry.title: Re: BADI for SAP EWM after Confirm and save WT in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF
entry.content:
Hello Dominik,

Thank you for your reply. I still don't understand how to access this BADI when I can't debug it?

From my understanding, I need to create an implementation of this BADI (/SCWM/IF_EX_CORE_CO_POST). However, how can I ensure that my code is correct if I can't debug it? Could you please provide some advice on this? Thank you.Best Regards

Tedi

entry.title: Re: WARNING MESSAGE - GLO_BUPLA000
entry.content:
Hi there,

as India is using taxes related to regions you have to maintain a business place for your plants in India and assign them to the plant:

1. Goto Manage your Solution or CBC and change to localization India

2. In the SSCUI 101326 maintain your business places (regions in India) that are relevant for the Indian plants

3. go to SSCUI 101316 and assign your business place to your plant

By doing so your PO will derive the business place out of the plant used and will not throw an error anymore.

Best regards

Anja

entry.title: Re: Odata API about Display material Cost Estimate
entry.content: Added Finance tag.

entry.title: Re: Odata API about Display material Cost Estimate

https://me.sap.com/notes/2974010

Best Regards,
Owen

Dennis

Is this related to the internal process or the picking process? If it's for the picking process, you can utilize wave management or 2 step picking.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

I am writing to express my strong interest in participating in the [Digital Skills Initiative] to pursue the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core. This opportunity aligns perfectly with my professional goals and my passion for advancing my skills in digital transformation and human capital management solutions.

As someone currently exploring a mid-life career change, I am particularly motivated to gain new skills and certifications that will allow me to transition into a role where I can leverage my experience while embracing new opportunities. The decision to pursue the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core is a key part of this transition. I believe that this certification will enable me to successfully pivot into a new field, bringing a fresh perspective and valuable experience to my future career endeavors.

I am experienced HR Professional with 6+ years of experience in human resources management, now transitioning into SAP SuccessFactors consulting. Demonstrates a deep understanding of HR processes, including talent acquisition, employee relations, performance management, and organizational development. Currently expanding expertise in SAP SuccessFactors to leverage advanced HR technology for optimizing HR functions and driving strategic improvements. Strong aptitude for learning and applying new technologies, with a focus on enhancing HR efficiency and effectiveness through successful implementation and configuration of SuccessFactors modules. Proven track record in developing and executing HR strategies that align with business goals, complemented by a commitment to mastering SAP SuccessFactors to deliver innovative and impactful HR solutions.

I am particularly drawn to this certification because of its comprehensive coverage of the core elements of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, including data models, business rules, workflows, and security. The knowledge and skills gained through this certification will enable me to effectively contribute to improving HR processes, implementing new systems, or advancing digital transformation initiatives.

In my commitment to achieving the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core, I have thoroughly explored and identified valuable self-study materials on the SAP Learning website. The official resources available there, including detailed training guides, interactive learning modules, and practice exams, have provided me with the structured and comprehensive content necessary to build a strong foundation in SAP SuccessFactors. I am confident that these resources will play a crucial role in my preparation and success in the certification process.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the opportunity to contribute and grow through this initiative.

Kind Regards,

Eslam Salah

entry.title: Re: Output Parameter Determination - Document in multiple...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please find an SAP Blog which explains how to generate multiple outputs for a business object: How to generate multiple output items for production orders with different form templates. You can try the same to generate 2 Forms of different languages for the same document.

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: Superior Commitment Item versus Sets
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are looking to configure budget control at the superior commitment level but have encountered some difficulties. Currently, we use Cover Group and create manually after we run the FMAVCREINIT program to transfer budget from commitment item to the cover group (budget goes on the high livel). Could you advise on how to directly allocate the budget to the superior commitment item to enable budget control at that level?

 

Thanks
